result.markdown: --- title: "Week 12: Review" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Review Assignment 1 * Announce winner of the forecasting competition * Discuss exam ## Pre-seminar activities Catch up on any exercises not yet done ## Tutorial exercises --> ## Assignments * [GA4](../assignments/G4.qmd) is due on Tuesday 26 May. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 12 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 27 May.
